intent: Log in as visual_user and view the inventory page laid out correctly.
step: Confirm the inventory page renders with the cart icon in its normal position
observed_behavior: The cart icon is shifted far to the right and overlaps the page edge; the 'Add to cart' button on the first item is misaligned and partially cut off.
agent_reasoning: The header layout looks broken compared to the standard user view — elements overlap and are clipped.
